items.question: What is Roll Anime to Fight!?
items.answer: Roll Anime to Fight! is a Roblox anime simulator about rolling fighters, merging units, building teams, and surviving waves.

items.question: Are there Roll Anime to Fight! codes?
items.answer: No official active code was verified in the current source package, so this site avoids fake code claims until an official source confirms one.

items.question: Is this site safe for scripts or exploits?
items.answer: No. This site covers normal gameplay only and excludes scripts, executors, keyless tools, auto-farm routes, and exploit advice.

home.modulesDescription: Use these sections for safe Roblox progression, verified information, and update-aware guide planning.

home.aboutTitle: What is Roll Anime to Fight!?
about: Roll Anime to Fight! is a Roblox anime simulator where players roll for fighters, merge units to improve their power, and send a team into enemy waves.
Progress depends on pulls, team strength, merges, mutations, and wave rewards, so this guide hub separates confirmed codes and safe gameplay advice from unsafe scripts, exploits, and fake code pages.

faq.question: What is Roll Anime to Fight!?
faq.answer: Roll Anime to Fight! is a Roblox anime simulator about rolling fighters, merging units, building teams, and surviving waves.

faq.question: Are there Roll Anime to Fight! codes?
faq.answer: No official active code was verified in the current source package, so this site avoids fake code claims until an official source confirms one.

faq.question: Is this site safe for scripts or exploits?
faq.answer: No. This site covers normal gameplay only and excludes scripts, executors, keyless tools, auto-farm routes, and exploit advice.
